short_description: Port 22 on SW-U10 PoE over-budget - IP camera power cycling
description: SW-U10 port 22 (Gi1/0/22) reports PoE over-budget events; connected IP camera is rebooting every ~8 minutes. Class-4 device drawing >25W on a Class-3 config. Either reduce PoE priority on another port or re-class the interface. Link itself is up and data passes between reboots.

cmdb.port_short_description: admin=up oper=up speed=1G duplex=full vlan=10 mode=access stp=forwarding
